# Clutch Squares

> Real-time NBA Squares for private watch parties. Create a game, invite friends, fill a 10×10 board, and win when your numbers hit at the end of each quarter.

Clutch Squares is a web app for hosting private NBA Squares games. Hosts create a game, invite players via code or link, players claim squares before tip-off, and the app syncs scores in real time, awards quarter winners, generates a shareable recap, and includes a TV-ready overlay.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Landing page introducing Clutch Squares and how it works.
- [Sign in / sign up](/auth): Email, Google, or guest sign in.
- [Dashboard](/dashboard): A signed-in player's active and past Squares games.
- [Create a game](/create): Set up a new private NBA Squares game.
- [Developer docs](/docs): Realtime game state subscriptions and live score updates.

## Optional

- [Join by invite code](/join/CODE): Players land here from a share link to join a host's game.
